newReleases.name: PaperFootball byDefectiveRobot
newReleases.desc:
PaperFootball byDefectiveRobot brings the classic folded-paper football tabletop game to your iPhone.
Play head-to-head on one device, take turns flicking the paper football across the field, and try to land the perfect touchdown. After every touchdown, line up the extra point and test your timing with a quick field goal challenge.
Features:
• Two-player local gameplay
• Simple flick controls
• Touchdown scoring
• Extra point field goal attempts
• Tabletop-style football field
• Quick games with no account required
• Local play designed for easy pickup-and-play fun
PaperFootball is built as a simple, casual sports game for players who enjoy quick competitive games, classic school-table football, and easy local multiplayer fun.
No account is required to play. Game activity and basic settings are handled locally on your device.

newReleases.name: Pack Flow - Pack & Sort
newReleases.desc:
Pack Flow is a satisfying sorting puzzle where every tap matters!

Move products onto the conveyor belt and deliver them to their matching shelves. Plan your moves carefully, keep the conveyor flowing, and organize every item perfectly to complete the level.

Sounds simple? Think again.

The conveyor has limited space. If it becomes full and there are no valid items left to place, the level fails. Every decision can bring you closer to victory, or create a costly traffic jam.

How to Play

- Tap items to place them onto the conveyor
- Match products with their corresponding shelf slots
- Keep the conveyor moving efficiently
- Clear all required items to complete the level
- Avoid filling the conveyor with unplaceable products

Features

- Easy-to-learn, satisfying gameplay
- Strategic sorting and organization puzzles
- Increasingly challenging levels
- Smooth animations and relaxing visuals
- Rewarding progression and clever puzzle design

Can you keep the shelves stocked and the conveyor running smoothly in Pack Flow?
newReleases.coreLoop: Pack Flow is a satisfying sorting puzzle where every tap matters! Move products onto the conveyor belt and deliver them to their matching shelves.

newReleases.name: Café Sort: Mimi's Barista
newReleases.desc:
Welcome to Café Sort: Mimi's Barista — a relaxing color-sort puzzle with a cozy café twist!

Pour colorful drink layers between tubes until each tube holds one color. Plan your moves, keep customers happy, and help Mimi run the barista counter through 80 handcrafted levels.

HOW TO PLAY
• Tap a tube to select it, then tap another to pour
• Pour only onto the same top color — or into an empty tube
• Sort every tube into a single color to complete the level
• Use empty tubes as temporary space when puzzles get tricky

CAFÉ CHALLENGE
• Customer orders add a fun goal beyond basic sorting
• Locked tubes open as you master tougher layouts
• Some levels add a timer — stay calm and serve in time
• Earn up to 3 stars per level

HELP WHEN YOU’RE STUCK
• Undo mistakes
• Hints show a smart next move
• Earn coins to buy extra hints, undos, and mystery boxes in the shop

PROGRESS & REWARDS
• 80 levels with rising difficulty
• Collect stars and coins
• Claim milestone rewards as you advance
• Play in English or Thai

PERFECT FOR
• Quick breaks or long chill sessions
• Fans of water sort, color sort, and logic puzzles
• Players who like cute themes, simple controls, and satisfying “aha!” moments

Download Café Sort: Mimi's Barista and start pouring your way to the perfect order!

---
Contains ads. Optional in-app purchase to remove ads. Coins and boosters are also available via in-app purchases or gameplay rewards.

newReleases.name: Arrow Stack!
newReleases.desc:
Arrow Stack! is a colorful 3D puzzle game about clearing arrow blocks in the right order.

Tap, think, and unstack each shape piece by piece. Every block can only move in the direction it points, so one smart move can open the whole puzzle, while one rushed tap can block your path. Read the arrows, plan your moves, and find the cleanest way to clear the stack.

From rainbows and penguins to lightning bolts, houses, planets, pencils, and more, each level turns a simple rule into a fresh 3D challenge. The early stages are easy to understand, but later puzzles ask you to plan ahead, spot hidden routes, and solve layered stacks without wasting moves.

Features:
- Simple tap-to-clear arrow block gameplay
- Bright 3D voxel-style puzzle shapes
- Levels built around logic, order, and spatial thinking
- Relaxing casual pacing with satisfying block-clearing moments
- New shapes and harder stacks as you progress

Can you read the arrows and clear every stack?

newReleases.name: Tide Farm

Tide Farm is a relaxing idle farming game shaped by the ocean tide.
Grow kelp beds, reef gardens, and coastal harvest spots that produce Brine over time. Watch the tide rise and fall as it changes your production, then upgrade your farm to make each cycle stronger.
Collect during low tide, improve your harvest, unlock market upgrades, and track your progress in the Almanac. When your farm grows far enough, start a Seasonal Migration to earn Pearls and boost future runs.
Features:
• Relaxing idle farming gameplay
• Ocean tide production cycle
• Brine resource growth over time
• 8 coastal farm beds to unlock
• Market upgrades and farm boosts
• Tap harvest during low tide
• Seasonal Migration prestige system
• Pearls for lasting progress
• Almanac with records and milestones
• Animated shore and tide theme
Grow your coastal farm, follow the tide, and turn each season into stronger progress.

newReleases.name: BOBADA - nonsense challenge
newReleases.desc:
BOBADA — Nonsense Challenge is a playful daily creativity app built around one simple idea: sometimes the best ideas make absolutely no sense.
In Spanish, “bobada” means nonsense — something silly, absurd, or wonderfully ridiculous. This app turns that idea into a daily creative game where bananas need lawyers, clouds become suspicious, sandwiches run for mayor, and chairs forget how sitting works.
BOBADA is made for quick laughs, strange little thoughts, and moments when your brain needs something lighter than another serious app.
Every day, you get a new nonsense challenge. Generate an absurd answer, give it a Bobada Score, save your funniest creations, and build a private collection of your favorite ridiculous moments.
You can also create your own Bobadas using preset choices, play quick mini-games, and test your instinct for what is normal — and what is pure Bobada.
Why BOBADA?
Most apps ask you to be productive, focused, serious, or perfectly organized.
BOBADA does the opposite.
It gives you a small creative break where the goal is not to be correct — the goal is to be weird, funny, and unexpected. It is a simple space for playful thinking, word humor, and absurd combinations that make you smile for no serious reason.
A banana with legal problems? A cloud with too much confidence? A sandwich applying for a passport?
That is BOBADA.
Features
* Daily nonsense challenge
* Absurd sentence generator
* Bobada Builder with preset creative choices
* Bobada Score system
* Save yo

newReleases.name: Bubble Shooter - GFA

Bubble Shooter is the classic arcade game, polished and ready for one more round. Aim, shoot, and pop groups of matching bubbles to clear the board and rack up points.

Easy to learn, satisfying to master — and there's always time for one more shot.

HOW TO PLAY
• Tap to aim and shoot a bubble.
• Match 3 or more of the same color to pop them and earn bonus time.
• New rows push down every few shots — keep the board from filling up.
• Hit match milestones to level up (1–10) as the pace builds.

WHY YOU'LL LIKE IT
• Smooth aiming with a clear trajectory line.
• Swap your current and next bubble for the perfect shot.
• Climb the Game Center leaderboard with your high score.
• Quick to start, perfect for one more round.
• Plays offline — no account or sign-up required.

《審查員加班工廠》是一款快節奏分類小遊戲。你是第100隻小廢廢紀念班的審查員，面前三條輸送帶會不斷送來 App 卡片。看圖示、標籤和狀態線索，等卡片進入審查桌，再用 PASS、FIX、REJECT 三顆章快速判斷。
每局 30 秒，節奏短、回饋快。連續正確會累積 combo，完美蓋章會加分，錯章或空蓋會讓精神下降。補件卡會回流，偽裝卡會混進隊伍，急件倒數會逼你在三條輸送帶之間做取捨。
完成班次後會產生交班報告，顯示分數、準確率、最大 combo、解鎖回顧卡與主管評語。第100隻小廢廢加班收藏冊會記錄你的回顧卡進度，讓每一班都有新的收集目標。
適合喜歡短局、反應、分類、蓋章手感與復古工廠風格的玩家。

newReleases.name: Meowdoku!
newReleases.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

Idle Game, but with a massive interactive world

• Satisfying money merging and stacking gameplay

• Smooth and intuitive touch controls

• Relaxing gameplay with no time pressure

• Clean visuals and rewarding animations

• Fun brain exercise for players of all ages

Whether you want to relax your mind or challenge your puzzle skills, Money Sort offers a rewarding and addictive experience you can enjoy anytime.

All in Hole is the oddly satisfying black-hole puzzle where you guide Molly the mole on a snack-swallowing adventure. Slide a tiny hole, devour small objects to grow, and use playful physics to gobble every target treat. Whether you’re here to zen out or chase trophies, All in Hole serves up quick, colorful levels that feel great to master.

Why you’ll love it
- Smooth, tactile physics — swipe, scoop, and watch the hole snap up anything in its path
- Smart goals — sort and swallow only what’s required to clear the puzzle
- Relax or compete — chill at your own pace or enter limited-time tournaments and climb the leaderboard
- Team up — join a crew to chat, share hearts and coins, and earn sweet bonuses together
- Yummy progression — collect ingredients, unlock recipes, and decorate cakes
- Handy boosts — grab energy and time helpers for tough stages
- Fresh drops — regular events and new levels

How to play
- Drag to move the black hole
- Eat small items to grow larger
- Swallow the target treats to finish the level

Tips from Molly
- Look ahead: plan a clean route so you don’t block yourself
- Prioritize: gulp the light stuff first, then the big bites

All in Hole wraps strategic puzzles, cozy vibes, and competitive thrills into one satisfying experience. Help Molly become the ultimate hole master — then keep collecting, decorating, and teaming up for bonuses. Ready to relax and swallow the challenge? Jump in now!

updates.name: Pixel Flow!
updates.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
updates.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

updates.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
updates.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

updates.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
updates.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

Welcome to Hole.io, the wildly satisfying eat-the-world game played by millions! Drop into busy New York, a creaky pirate cove, or a glowing sci-fi metropolis - and swallow it whole. Cars, lampposts, hot dogs and even giant skyscrapers! 

Whether you've got five minutes while watching your favorite show or an hour to unwind before bed, just tap, glide, and watch the city crumble into a black hole. No pressure, no stress - just the pure, oddly relaxing joy of eating everything in sight. 

EAT EVERYTHING
Start tiny, barely big enough to swallow a trash can. Grow huge, big enough to gulp down skyscrapers in one bite. The bigger you get, the louder the crunch. Pure satisfaction.  

THE PERFECT BREAK 
Easy to learn, instantly satisfying. Play in short bursts: morning coffee, lunch break, evening unwind. A relaxing, oddly soothing game for casual players.  

WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT 
- Wonderfully simple controls - just swipe and glide.
- Insanely satisfying gameplay - swallow, smash, and clear the map.
- Beautiful, vibrant 3D worlds packed with detail.
- Free to play, easy to love. 

Ready to swallow the world? Download Hole.io now and find out why millions of players can't put it down. Time to feed the black hole.

Swallow it all. Update now!

updates.name: Amaze GO!
updates.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime. 

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

Made for

all.name: Pack Flow - Pack & Sort
all.desc:
Pack Flow is a satisfying sorting puzzle where every tap matters!

Move products onto the conveyor belt and deliver them to their matching shelves. Plan your moves carefully, keep the conveyor flowing, and organize every item perfectly to complete the level.

Sounds simple? Think again.

The conveyor has limited space. If it becomes full and there are no valid items left to place, the level fails. Every decision can bring you closer to victory, or create a costly traffic jam.

How to Play

- Tap items to place them onto the conveyor
- Match products with their corresponding shelf slots
- Keep the conveyor moving efficiently
- Clear all required items to complete the level
- Avoid filling the conveyor with unplaceable products

Features

- Easy-to-learn, satisfying gameplay
- Strategic sorting and organization puzzles
- Increasingly challenging levels
- Smooth animations and relaxing visuals
- Rewarding progression and clever puzzle design

Can you keep the shelves stocked and the conveyor running smoothly in Pack Flow?

all.name: Café Sort: Mimi's Barista
all.desc:
Welcome to Café Sort: Mimi's Barista — a relaxing color-sort puzzle with a cozy café twist!

Pour colorful drink layers between tubes until each tube holds one color. Plan your moves, keep customers happy, and help Mimi run the barista counter through 80 handcrafted levels.

HOW TO PLAY
• Tap a tube to select it, then tap another to pour
• Pour only onto the same top color — or into an empty tube
• Sort every tube into a single color to complete the level
• Use empty tubes as temporary space when puzzles get tricky

CAFÉ CHALLENGE
• Customer orders add a fun goal beyond basic sorting
• Locked tubes open as you master tougher layouts
• Some levels add a timer — stay calm and serve in time
• Earn up to 3 stars per level

HELP WHEN YOU’RE STUCK
• Undo mistakes
• Hints show a smart next move
• Earn coins to buy extra hints, undos, and mystery boxes in the shop

PROGRESS & REWARDS
• 80 levels with rising difficulty
• Collect stars and coins
• Claim milestone rewards as you advance
• Play in English or Thai

PERFECT FOR
• Quick breaks or long chill sessions
• Fans of water sort, color sort, and logic puzzles
• Players who like cute themes, simple controls, and satisfying “aha!” moments

Download Café Sort: Mimi's Barista and start pouring your way to the perfect order!

---

all.name: Arrow Stack!
all.desc:
Arrow Stack! is a colorful 3D puzzle game about clearing arrow blocks in the right order.

Tap, think, and unstack each shape piece by piece. Every block can only move in the direction it points, so one smart move can open the whole puzzle, while one rushed tap can block your path. Read the arrows, plan your moves, and find the cleanest way to clear the stack.

From rainbows and penguins to lightning bolts, houses, planets, pencils, and more, each level turns a simple rule into a fresh 3D challenge. The early stages are easy to understand, but later puzzles ask you to plan ahead, spot hidden routes, and solve layered stacks without wasting moves.

Features:
- Simple tap-to-clear arrow block gameplay
- Bright 3D voxel-style puzzle shapes
- Levels built around logic, order, and spatial thinking
- Relaxing casual pacing with satisfying block-clearing moments
- New shapes and harder stacks as you progress

all.name: BOBADA - nonsense challenge
all.desc:
BOBADA — Nonsense Challenge is a playful daily creativity app built around one simple idea: sometimes the best ideas make absolutely no sense.
In Spanish, “bobada” means nonsense — something silly, absurd, or wonderfully ridiculous. This app turns that idea into a daily creative game where bananas need lawyers, clouds become suspicious, sandwiches run for mayor, and chairs forget how sitting works.
BOBADA is made for quick laughs, strange little thoughts, and moments when your brain needs something lighter than another serious app.
Every day, you get a new nonsense challenge. Generate an absurd answer, give it a Bobada Score, save your funniest creations, and build a private collection of your favorite ridiculous moments.
You can also create your own Bobadas using preset choices, play quick mini-games, and test your instinct for what is normal — and what is pure Bobada.
Why BOBADA?
Most apps ask you to be productive, focused, serious, or perfectly organized.
BOBADA does the opposite.
It gives you a small creative break where the goal is not to be correct — the goal is to be weird, funny, and unexpected. It is a simple space for playful thinking, word humor, and absurd combinations that make you smile for no serious reason.
A banana with legal problems? A cloud with too much confidence? A sandwich applying for a passport?
That is BOBADA.
Features
* Daily nonsense challenge
* Absurd sentence generator
* Bobada Builder with preset creative choices
* Bobada Score system
* Save yo

all.name: Meowdoku!
all.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

all.name: All in Hole: Black Hole Games
all.desc:
All in Hole is the oddly satisfying black-hole puzzle where you guide Molly the mole on a snack-swallowing adventure. Slide a tiny hole, devour small objects to grow, and use playful physics to gobble every target treat. Whether you’re here to zen out or chase trophies, All in Hole serves up quick, colorful levels that feel great to master.

Why you’ll love it
- Smooth, tactile physics — swipe, scoop, and watch the hole snap up anything in its path
- Smart goals — sort and swallow only what’s required to clear the puzzle
- Relax or compete — chill at your own pace or enter limited-time tournaments and climb the leaderboard
- Team up — join a crew to chat, share hearts and coins, and earn sweet bonuses together
- Yummy progression — collect ingredients, unlock recipes, and decorate cakes
- Handy boosts — grab energy and time helpers for tough stages
- Fresh drops — regular events and new levels

How to play
- Drag to move the black hole
- Eat small items to grow larger
- Swallow the target treats to finish the level

Tips from Molly
- Look ahead: plan a clean route so you don’t block yourself
- Prioritize: gulp the light stuff first, then the big bites

All in Hole wraps strategic puzzles, cozy vibes, and competitive thrills into one satisfying experience. Help Molly become the ultimate hole master — then keep collecting, decorating, and teaming up for bonuses. Ready to relax and swallow the challenge? Jump in now!

all.name: Pixel Flow!
all.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
all.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.
all.releaseNotes: The fun continues with our latest update! New content to explore, gameplay to enjoy, and performance so smooth you’ll notice right away. We fixed bugs, added sparkle, and made everything better for you!

all.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
all.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.
all.releaseNotes: Good news, players — the latest update is here! We’ve squashed bugs, boosted performance, and added fresh polish to keep the fun going strong.

all.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
all.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

Why Choose Screwdom?
• Perfect for All Ages: Whether you're a casual player or a hardcore screw puzzle solver, this screw puzzle offers a perfect challenge and fun for everyone.
• Sharpen Your Brain: This screwdom puzzle will enhance your logical thinking, problem-solving, and strategy-making skills as you work your way through increasingly tricky levels.
• No Time Limits: Play at your own pace! There's no rush, so you can take your time to solve each screwdom puzzle and enjoy the process.
How to Play:
• Look at the screwdom stacked on different pins.
• Identify the color of screw master 3D that matches and move them to the correct box.
• Be mindful of the order in which you move the screwdom – one wrong move can block your progress.
• Keep sorting the screwdom until each color is placed in the corresponding box.
• Unlock more levels and enjoy endless screw puzzle.

With gradually increasing difficulty and thousands of handcrafted levels, this game stands among the best games for iq improvement, training, and problem solving. Game Features
• Category-based logic puzzles that are fun and easy to learn
• Relaxing yet challenging brain training game experience
• Thoughtful level design that blends crossword themes with sorting mechanics
• Offline-friendly play with no wifi games for free
• Precision controls, helpful boosters, and a scrabble-like strategy for extended sessions

all.name: Amaze GO!
all.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime. 

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

Made for
all.releaseNotes: Optimized user experience and performance!
all.coreLoop: A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order.
